postReview.title: Mexico see off Saudi Arabia to set up Honduras semi-final showdown
postReview.description: Mexico overcame Saudi Arabia to seal a CONCACAF Gold Cup semi-final meeting with Honduras, who beat Panama on penalties.

QAData.question: Who won between Panama and Honduras on Sat, 28 Jun 2025 23:15:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Honduras won 1–1 (5–4) over Panama after penalties on Sat, 28 Jun 2025 23:15:00 GMT.
